case_title: CAL WRECKING, INC. VS. WENDWEST CONSTRUCTION, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LANDRY'S SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC., DOMINIC DIMAGGIO, EMILY F. DIMAGGIO, EMILY C. DIMAGGIO, D.PAUL DIMAGGIO & PETER J. DIMAGGIO; AND WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ALL OTHER DEFENDANTS
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS AGB CAPITAL CONSTRUCTION CO. TO BE AGB CAPITAL PROPERTIES, INC. AKA AGB CAPITAL CONSTRUCTION CO.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL WRECKING, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WENDWEST CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CORPORATION AGB CAPITAL PROPERTIES, INC. AKA AGB CAPITAL CONSTRUCTION CO. CONTRACTOR'S BONDING AND INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION LANDRY'S SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, INC. A CORPORATION DI MAGGIO, DOMINIC DI MAGGIO, EMILY F DI MAGGIO, EMILY C DI MAGGIO, D PAUL DI MAGGIO, PETER J DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-04-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-02-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-06-2002
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-18-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-18-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-04-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
